verses.text: Tu-in Israel mite, beh lutangte, a tul leh a za-a a ukte, leh khen khatah mi tul sawmnih leh tul li a om, kum tawntung kha khat khit kha khat hong tungin a kuankhia a khente tawh kisai-in na khempeuhah kumpipa' na a sem a uliante
A kha masa sungin Zabdiel' tapa Jashobeam a khen masa a uk hi a, ama khen sungah mi tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
Amah pen Perez' suanlekhak hi a, a kha masa sungin galkap a ukte khempeuh a ukpi ahi hi
A kha nihna sungin Ahoh-te beh Dodai a khen a ukpi hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha thumna sungin siampi Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah a ukpi hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
Hihpa pen mihing sawmthumte sungah a thahat, mihing sawmthumte a uk Benaiah hi a, ama tapa Ammizabad pen ama khen a ukpa ahi hi
A kha lina sungin Joab sanggampa Asahel hi a, ama nungah amah a laih dingin a tapa Zebadiah om hi. Ama khen sungah mi tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha ngana sungin Izrah-te beh Shamhuth hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha gukna sungin Tekoa khuami Ikkesh' tapa Ira hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha sagihna sungin Efraim suante sung panin Pelon khuami Helez hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha giatna sungin Jerah mi sung panin Hushah khuami Sibbekai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha kuana sungin Benjamin mi sung panin Anathoth khuami Abiezer hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha sawmna sungin Zerah mi sung panin Netofah khuami Maharai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha sawmlekhatna sungin Efraim suante sung panin Pirathon khuami Benaiah hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
A kha sawmlenihna sungin Othniel' suante sung panin Netofah khuami Heldai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawmnih leh tul li om hi
Israel minamte tungah a ukpite: Reuben mite-a' dingin Zikri' tapa Eliezer ahi hi. Simeon mite-a' dingin Maakah' tapa Shefatiah ahi hi
Levi mite-a' dingin Kemuel' tapa Hashabiah ahi hi. Aaron mite-a' dingin Zadok ahi hi
Judah mite-a' dingin David' sanggamte' sung panin Elihu ahi hi. Issakhar mite-a' dingin Mikhael' tapa Omri ahi hi
Zebulun mite-a' dingin Obadiah' tapa Ishmaiah ahi hi. Naftali mite-a' dingin Azriel' tapa Jeremoth ahi hi
Efraim mite-a' dingin Azariah' tapa Hoshea ahi hi. Manasseh minam a langte-a' dingin Pedaiah' tapa Joel ahi hi
Gilead gamsunga Manasseh minam alangte-a' dingin Zekhariah' tapa Iddo ahi hi. Benjamin mite-a' dingin Abner' tapa Jaasiel ahi hi
Dan mite-a' dingin Jehoram' tapa Azarel ahi hi. Hihte pen Israel minamte' makaite ahi uh hi
Israel mite vantung aksi zahin a tamin a bawlna ding Topa in thu ciam khin ahih manin David in kum sawmnih leh a nuaisiah mite simlo hi

Zeruiah' tapa Joab in sim ding kipan a, ahih hangin zo manlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu hangin Israel tungah Pasian' hehna hong tung a, Kumpi David' khang tangthu sungah tua a kisimte kikhumlo hi

Kumpipa' vanmanpha a ukte: Kumpipa' vanmanpha koihnate-ah Adiel' tapa Azmaveth ahi hi. Gamsunga vanmanpha koihnate, khuapi sungate, khuaneute leh tausangte sunga omte tungah Uzziah' tapa Jonathan ahi hi
Lo khawh nasep a sem mite tungah Khelub' tapa Ezri ahi hi
Leenggui lote tungah Ramah khuami Shimei ahi hi. Leenggui lo panin a piang leenggahzu koihnate tungah Shifmoth khuami Zabdi ahi hi
Shefelah gamsunga om oliv leh theithek kungte tungah Gederah khuami Baalhanan ahi hi. Sathau koihnate tungah Joash ahi hi
Sharon gamsungah a gamta ganhonte tungah Sharon khuami Shitrai ahi hi. Kuam sunga om ganhonte tungah Adlai' tapa Shafat ahi hi
Kalaohte tungah Ishmael mi Obil ahi hi. La a nute tungah Meronoth khuami Jehdeiah ahi hi. Tuuhonte tungah Hagri mi Jaziz ahi hi
Hihte khempeuh pen Kumpi David' neihsa a kemte ahi hi
David' pano Jonathan pen thuthei mi leh laithei mi ahih manin thu lamlakpa ahi hi. Amah leh Hakmoni' tapa Jehiel in kumpipa' tapate cing uh hi
Ahithofel pen kumpipa' thu lamlakpa hi a, Arkhi mi Hushai pen kumpipa' lawmpa ahi hi
Ahithofel a sih ciangin Benaiah' tapa Jehoiada leh Abiathar in laih uh hi. Joab pen kumpipa' galkapte a ukpa ahi hi.
